rpcUrl.description: 0G Chain RPC endpoint. Galileo testnet: https://evmrpc-testnet.0g.ai. Aristotle mainnet: https://evmrpc.0g.ai.

indexerUrl.description: 0G Storage indexer endpoint. Galileo: https://indexer-storage-testnet-turbo.0g.ai. Mainnet: https://indexer-storage-turbo.0g.ai.

agenticIdAddress.description: AgenticID contract address (our Epic-7 deploys per ADR-13). Galileo: 0xd4a5eA2501810d7C81464aa3CdBa58Bfded09E38. Aristotle mainnet: 0xC6f7fB1511a7483C6e14258c70529e37ec698937.

verifierAddress.description: MockTEEVerifier contract address (our Epic-7 deploys, teeOracleAddress = deployer wallet). Galileo: 0x058fc372562D195F1c2356e4DcFfD94de98Ec3ad. Aristotle mainnet: 0x4fffB58B488bBeD9f072Ad68EeB77F643b8858D2.

verifyUrlBase.description: Base URL of the verifier dashboard. The DOMAIN carries the network signal (Epic-7 subdomain split: 'https://agentscan.online' = testnet root, 'https://mainnet.agentscan.online' = mainnet subdomain). Appended to the relative /verify/<tokenId> path returned by SessionAnchor.anchor().

chainId.description: EVM chainId. Defaults to 16602 (Galileo testnet). Set 16661 for Aristotle mainnet. Pair with the matching agenticIdAddress, verifierAddress, rpcUrl, indexerUrl, and verifyUrlBase — there's no auto-switch (silent network swap is worse than a one-time edit).

agentId.description: 0x-prefixed 20-byte address identifying the agent. Defaults to the plugin's auto-generated wallet address. Override to bind proofs to a different identity than the signing key.

modelId.description: Model identifier baked into ADR-08 dataDescription strings (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'). Bound at plugin-load time so individual sessions don't have to thread it.

privateKeyEnvVar.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the signer private key (default 'PRIVATE_KEY'). The plugin reads `process.env[<name>]` at session-end time so the key never sits in OpenClaw config files.
